name: copy_ip
full_help:
copy_ip

Description: 
Copy an existing IP

Syntax: 
copy_ip  -name <arg> [-dir <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <objects>...

Returns: 
IP file object that was added to the project

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -name       Name of copied IP
  [-dir]      Directory path for remote IP to be created and managed outside 
              the project
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <objects>   IP to be copied

Categories: 
Project, IPFlow

arguments.description: Directory path for remote IP to be created and managed outside the project
Suspend message limits during command execution
